message:
refactor(abi): migrate brk, sbrk, getcwd, alarm, stat to native syscalls

Replace libc::syscall with frankenlibc_core::syscall wrappers:
- brk/sbrk: sys_brk
- get_current_dir_name: sys_getcwd
- alarm (aarch64): sys_setitimer (emulated, no direct SYS_alarm)
- stat: sys_newfstatat

Adds sys_brk wrapper to syscall module.
Reduces libc::syscall calls from 129 to 122.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
